Social Media Sizes

Find the exact image dimensions for every platform and format. Download a blank canvas at the right size instantly.

Advertisement

Select Platform

Select Format

Select a format above to see the dimensions
Advertisement

Why do social media image sizes matter?

Each platform crops and displays images differently. Using the wrong size results in blurry, cropped or distorted images that hurt engagement.

Which platforms are covered?

Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter/X and Pinterest. All major content types including posts, stories, banners, profile pictures and thumbnails.

What is the blank canvas download?

A blank JPG file at exactly the right pixel dimensions for your chosen format. Open it in any design tool and start creating at the correct size.

⚡ PixMidas

Free browser-based tools. No login required. Runs locally in your browser.
